sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْكُتَّابُ صُوَرًا بَلَاغِيَّةً فِي كِتَابَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Pisci koriste retoričke slike u svojim djelima.
sentences.translationEn: Writers use rhetorical imagery in their writings.

sentences.arabic: مَثَلًا، يَقُولُ الْكَاتِبُ: "الشَّمْسُ مِصْبَاحٌ ذَهَبِيٌّ فِي السَّمَاءِ".
sentences.translation: Na primjer, pisac kaže: "Sunce je zlatna svjetiljka na nebu."
sentences.translationEn: For example, a writer says: 'The sun is a golden lamp in the sky.'

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّشْبِيهُ يَجْعَلُ النَّصَّ أَجْمَلَ وَأَقْوَى.
sentences.translation: Ovo poređenje čini tekst ljepšim i snažnijim.
sentences.translationEn: This simile makes the text more beautiful and stronger.

sentences.arabic: الْقَارِئُ يَتَخَيَّلُ جَمَالَ الطَّبِيعَةِ مِنْ خِلَالِ الْكَلِمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Čitalac zamišlja ljepotu prirode kroz riječi.
sentences.translationEn: The reader imagines the beauty of nature through the words.

sentences.arabic: اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ غَنِيَّةٌ بِهَذِهِ الصُّوَرِ الرَّائِعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik je bogat ovim divnim slikama.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is rich with these wonderful images.
